name: lock-acquire on a non-registered section name is rejected with the registered list
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section made-up-section --owner pid-1234 --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_section' err.txt && grep -q 'registered_sections=' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
